slack_work.context: DM with Annie Cutting, Alexandra Munteanu
slack_work.summary: Notified stakeholders that SF sync for proposal units will now include liquidation_date parameters to distinguish liquidation events.
slack_work.description: Tommy proactively informed Annie Cutting and Alex Munteanu that the DcPlanComplianceProposalUnit SF sync (originally set up by Jeff) is being extended to pass liquidation_date parameters so ops can tell whether an insufficient-balance unit is due to a liquidation event.

slack_work.summary: Investigating why AAA eoy_mv (cash asset) does not reflect reversal__deposit records for dc_plan 165716 despite adjustments being generated.
slack_work.description: Tommy reached out to Mads Moeller (Data Eng) to verify whether reversal__deposit records (CASH asset type) are summed into eoy_mv in AAA calculations. ReconOps had reported end-of-year values not updating, and Tommy confirmed the AAA record was generated from the adjustment but the EOY figure wasn't changing.

slack_work.summary: Resolved stuck 8955 amendments for 3 plans: prepared corrected amendment preflights, submitted them, and confirmed FIRE processed them as GOOD.
slack_work.description: Tommy diagnosed that 8955 amendments were pulling PYE dates from the base filing preflight instead of the amendment preflight, fixed the logic, prepared new amendments for dc_plans 34890/46666/48709 with corrected preflights, submitted them, and confirmed with Liam that FIRE returned GOOD status — all 3 are now fulfilled.

slack_work.summary: Continuing investigation into AAA eoy_mv not updating for dc_plan 165716 — confirmed DE includes reversal__deposits, now digging further.
slack_work.description: After verifying with Mads that reversal__deposit field key is rolled into AAA calculations, Tommy updated Jonathon Meyer that the issue is not on the Data Eng side and that he is continuing to investigate why the EOY values aren't reflecting in the filing for that specific plan.

slack_work.summary: Investigating stalled BTC SFTP inbound file pipeline — confirmed automation is working on our side, querying whether BTC needs to push from their end.
slack_work.description: Tommy messaged Marouane Fattoumy asking whether BTC needs to trigger a push on their side, noting the automation pipeline appears healthy on Guideline's end and that any received files would appear in the btc_inbound files table.
